name: Velveeta Fudge
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix cocoa powder and powdered sugar.
2. Melt cheese and butter in a heavy saucepan over medium/low heat.
3. Stir continuously until the mixture is fully dissolved.
4. Do not cook for too long or it will begin to scorch and form lumps at the bottom of the pan.
5. Add vanilla extract and stir to combine.
6. Pour the melted cheese and butter mixture into the cocoa and powdered sugar mixture.
7. If desired, add chopped nuts.
8. Mix thoroughly with a large heavy spoon.
9. Pour the mixture into square pans (two or more).
10. Chill until set, then cut into squares.
Note: Use a non-stick saucepan to prevent the cheese from sticking. An extra large bowl is needed as this recipe makes over 6 pounds of fudge. It is recommended to make half a batch for easier handling, especially when trying it for the first time.
